claim: The independently validated fifth exact-degree link orbit discovered in canonical frontier cell s-r1-3 cannot be extended to a 40-block C(12,6,4) cover under the forced-matching exact pair-count formulation.

semantic_core.minimality: Deletion-minimized for a fixed 60-second pass; sufficient and replay-verified, not claimed minimum.

structural_signal: All five known link orbits have a 20-edge triangle-free 4-regular low-pair graph on the ten nonexceptional points. The fifth orbit has two low-pair edges aligned with the forced matching; earlier known orbits realize zero, one, or three.
claim_limit: This excludes completion of this link orbit and supplies a sufficient semantic obstruction. It does not prove the five-orbit catalogue exhaustive, close cell s-r1-3 after blocking the new orbit, or settle C(12,6,4).
